purpose: Simple qualification path for 5G broadband/fiber offers.
requiredBeforeShowingBroadbandOffers: Customer should use the address search or coverage map to check location context.
If customer asks in chat, guide them to enter address on the 5G broadband page or open the coverage map.

questions.questionSv: Vill du skriva in adressen på 5G-bredbandssidan eller öppna täckningskartan?
questions.questionEn: Do you want to enter your address on the 5G broadband page or open the coverage map?

rules: Do not ask many broadband questions in chat.
For broadband, the main path is to send the customer to the 5G broadband page, enter address or open map, then show offers.
If customer asks generally, explain available 5G/fiber offers from 5Gbredband.json and mention 24 months binding time and gift card.
Do not promise exact availability until customer checks address/map.
